things.name: Bagan Ancient Temples
things.description: Over 2,000 Buddhist temples and pagodas on the plains - one of Asia's most extraordinary sights

things.name: Mandalay Hill
things.description: Hilltop complex of pagodas with a panoramic view at sunset over the Irrawaddy River

things.name: Shwenandaw Monastery
things.description: 19th-century teak monastery with the finest woodcarving in Myanmar

things.name: U Bein Bridge
things.description: World's longest teak bridge at 1.2km - sublime at sunset with monks and fishermen

things.name: Mahamuni Pagoda
things.description: One of Myanmar's holiest sites with a gold-plastered Buddha covered in 15cm of devotional gold leaf

things.name: Kuthodaw Pagoda (World's Largest Book)
things.description: 729 marble slabs inscribed with the entire Pali Buddhist scriptures

things.name: Mandalay Palace
things.description: 1859 royal palace of the last Burmese kingdom - moated complex with teakwood buildings

things.name: Gold Leaf Workshops
things.description: Watch artisans hand-beat gold into wafer-thin gold leaf sheets in the traditional quarter

things.name: Inwa (Ava)
things.description: Former Burmese capital accessible by ferry with ruins, horse carts and a leaning minaret

things.name: Sagaing Hill
things.description: Sacred hill with hundreds of white pagodas and monasteries across the river
